entity.summary: Asian centralized cryptocurrency exchange launched in January 2019 using Bittrex trading technology. Bitsdaq completed a brand and domain transition to BQ.net on January 20, 2020, ending the Bitsdaq identity while the successor service continued under the BQ name.
entity.notes: HEI treats January 20, 2020 as the terminal marker for the Bitsdaq brand, not the shutdown of the successor exchange service. BQ/BQ.net is not yet a canonical HEI entity, so successor_id remains null.

events.title: Bitsdaq launched its Asian exchange platform
events.description: Bitsdaq officially launched a digital-asset exchange for Asian markets using Bittrex trading technology.
events.notes: The January 29 date is stated in a later company announcement; the earlier launch release announced the platform for January 2019.

events.title: Bitsdaq rebranded and moved to BQ.net
events.description: Bitsdaq completed a technology and brand upgrade and launched the BQ.net identity and domain on January 20, 2020.
events.notes: The Bitsdaq brand ended, while the successor exchange service continued under BQ.net.

evidence.title: Bitsdaq launching Asian digital asset trading platform powered by Bittrex
evidence.notes: Company announcement states that Bitsdaq would launch its Bittrex-powered Asian exchange during January 2019.

evidence.title: Bitsdaq semi-anniversary announcement
evidence.notes: Company announcement explicitly dates the official exchange launch to January 29, 2019.

evidence.title: Bitsdaq launches BQ.net after rebranding
evidence.notes: First-party syndicated announcement records completion of the rebrand and the BQ.net launch.

evidence.title: Bittrex exchange partner spotlight: BQ.net
evidence.notes: Bittrex's partner spotlight corroborates the BQ.net successor identity and brand-upgrade launch.
